panels.description: Average gateway requests per minute over the selected time range.
panels.title: Gateway requests per minute

panels.description: 5xx request percentage over the selected time range.
panels.title: Gateway error rate

panels.description: Average per-model requests per minute over the selected time range.
panels.title: Avg requests per minute by model

panels.description: Requests, queue admissions, and non-2xx errors normalized to per-minute rates over the selected range.
panels.title: Request summary/min by model

panels.description: Per-model summary. Each row is one metric for one model.

targets.expr:
label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_model_loaded_replicas{model=~"$model"}[$__range]), "metric", "loaded_replicas", "model", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_model_active_requests{model=~"$model"}[$__range]), "metric", "active_requests", "model", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_model_queue_depth{model=~"$model"}[$__range]), "metric", "queue_depth", "model", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_model_underprovisioned{model=~"$model"}[$__range]), "metric", "underprovisioned", "model", ".*")
or label_replace((sum by (model) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_requests_total{model=~"$model"}[$__range])) / $__range_s) or on(model) (0 * last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_model_loaded_replicas{model=~"$model"}[$__range])), "metric", "rps", "model", ".*")
or label_replace((sum by (model) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_requests_total{model=~"$model",status_code=~"5.."}[$__range])) / $__range_s) or on(model) (0 * last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_model_loaded_replicas{model=~"$model"}[$__range])), "metric", "5xx_rps", "model", ".*")
or label_replace(sum by (model) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_requests_total{model=~"$model"}[$__range])), "metric", "requests_in_range", "model", ".*")
or label_replace(sum by (model) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_model_tokens_total{model=~"$model",type="total"}[$__range])), "metric", "tokens_in_range", "model", ".*")
or label_replace(sum by (model) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_request_duration_seconds_sum{model=~"$model"}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum by (model) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_request_duration_seconds_count{model=~"$model"}[$__range])), 1), "metric", "avg_latency", "model", ".*")
or label_replace(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (model, le) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_request_duration_seconds_bucket{model=~"$model"}[$__range]))), "metric", "p95_latency", "model", ".*")

panels.title: Model overview

panels.description: Per-worker summary. Each row is one metric for one worker.

targets.expr:
label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_up{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "up", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_active_requests{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "active_requests", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_running_models{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "running_models", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace(time() - last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_last_heartbeat_seconds{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "heartbeat_age", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_needs_restart{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "needs_restart", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_last_error_present{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "last_error", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_capacity_max_concurrency{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "max_concurrency", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace(last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_capacity_max_queue{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range]), "metric", "max_queue", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace((sum by (worker_id) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_worker_requests_total{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range])) / $__range_s) or on(worker_id) (0 * last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_up{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range])), "metric", "worker_rps", "worker_id", ".*")
or label_replace((sum by (worker_id) (increase(llm_swap_gateway_worker_metrics_scrape_errors_total{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range])) / $__range_s) or on(worker_id) (0 * last_over_time(llm_swap_gateway_worker_up{worker_id=~"$worker"}[$__range])), "metric", "scrape_error_rps", "worker_id", ".*")

__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus or VictoriaMetrics
__inputs.description: Prometheus-compatible datasource. VictoriaMetrics works through the Prometheus query API.
